content.text: UX/accessibility review of the rendered surface. Finding 1 (high): The hero has no alt attribute. Screen-reader users get no description of the primary product visual. This violates WCAG 1.1.1 Non-text Content. Remediation: add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. alt="A blue Acme widget on a workbench". Finding 2 (high): The search has no associated label — it relies only on placeholder text. This is an unlabeled control and violates WCAG 1.3.1 / 4.1.2 (name, role, value). Remediation: add a bound to the input id. Verdict: two accessibility defects found.
